notes: Community-aggregated estimates (ThePriceDex, no published sample size; DripShop community analysis broadly concordant: VMAX ~1/25, top secrets <0.5%/pack). Rare slot: V 1/6.4, VMAX 1/28.2, ultra rare 1/18.6, rainbow 1/63.7, secret 1/75.8, residual on rare-holo (the set has no plain non-holo rares; every pack yields a holo or better). Reverse filler approximated 50/50 common/uncommon — no hit replacement in this set. packSize excludes energy and code card. No booster display ever existed (special set); ETB holds 10 packs.
